metadata.semantic_description:
Sex: Male
Highly competitive Agreeableness (19th pct) — Competitive, skeptical, challenging
Highly conscientious Conscientiousness (98th pct) — Disciplined, organised, dependable, goal-directed
Ambivert Extraversion (45th pct)
Very stable Neuroticism (10th pct) — Emotionally stable, calm, resilient
Open Openness to Experience (67th pct) — Open, curious, imaginative, creative
  Very Low Tender-Mindedness (11th pct) — Tough-minded, unsympathetic, objective
  Very High Achievement Striving (100th pct) — Ambitious, driven, works hard toward goals
  Very High Self-Discipline (100th pct) — Self-disciplined, persistent, finishes tasks
  Very Low Activity Level (19th pct) — Leisurely pace, relaxed
  Moderate Excitement Seeking (40th pct)
  Moderate Positive Emotions (56th pct)
  Very Low Anger / Hostility (19th pct) — Slow to anger, easy-going
  Very Low Self-Consciousness (2nd pct) — Comfortable socially, not easily embarrassed
  Very stable Neuroticism (4th pct) — Emotionally stable, calm, resilient
  Moderate Chronological Age (57th pct)

message.reasoning:
We are simulating a baseline opinion on "Alliance_Commitment_Support" for profile_0317. The profile is a 57-year-old male, highly conscientious (98th percentile mean), very low neuroticism (10th pct), low agreeableness (19th pct mean), ambivert extraversion (45th), open to experience (67th). Specific facets: very low tender-mindedness (11th pct), very high achievement striving and self-discipline (100th), low activity level (19th), moderate excitement seeking (40th), low anger/hostility (19th), very low self-consciousness (2nd). Emotionally stable, competitive, tough-minded, disciplined, goal-oriented.

Policy: support for alliance commitments (e.g., NATO, mutual defense treaties). This is a security/foreign policy issue. Given profile: high conscientiousness and low agreeableness might indicate a pragmatic, duty-bound view but not necessarily warm toward international cooperation. Low tender-mindedness suggests toughness, realism; low trust (23.7th pct) indicates skepticism of others' intentions. High dutifulness (94.7th) might lean toward honoring commitments, but also high deliberation (91.4th) suggests careful thought. Low straightforwardness (6.2nd) could mean strategic thinking, not naive. Achievement striving (100th) might see alliances as tools for national strength. Emotional stability means not easily swayed by fear/anxiety about alliances; neutral affect.

Overall: likely moderate support for alliance commitments, recognizing their strategic utility but also cautious about free-riding or over-commitment. Not extreme. Given low trust and tender-mindedness, probably not maximal support. Possibly around +400 to +600. Avoid round numbers. Let's pick 437.

Confidence: high 0.78, as profile is clear but not deterministic.

Reasoning: "High conscientiousness and dutifulness push toward honoring alliance commitments as a matter of responsibility and strategic planning, while low agreeableness and trust temper enthusiasm, leading to moderate support without idealistic over-commitment."
